cleanedEvents.title: Endocrinology results follow-up visit
cleanedEvents.description: Results follow-up documented in Dallas Endocrinology for adrenal insufficiency, ALD, status post allogeneic bone marrow transplant, and X-linked adrenoleukodystrophy.

cleanedEvents.title: Fludrocortisone increased to 0.1 mg daily
cleanedEvents.description: Provider increased fludrocortisone dose to 0.1 mg daily.

cleanedEvents.title: Hydrocortisone dose increased after elevated ACTH and renin
cleanedEvents.description: Provider documented that ACTH remained high after stress dosing and renin was elevated, and increased baseline hydrocortisone to 10 mg in the morning while continuing 7.5 mg in the afternoon and evening.

cleanedEvents.title: Mother reported fatigue, color changes, dry lips, and thirst
cleanedEvents.description: Nursing note documented that the patient's mother reported he was very tired, had rapid color changes, dry lips, and thirst, and that recommendations would be sent through MyChart.

cleanedEvents.title: MyChart guidance sent to family
cleanedEvents.description: Family was told the patient could increase the new morning hydrocortisone dose to 4 pills and to contact the oncology team or go to the ER if symptoms persisted.

cleanedEvents.title: Repeat endocrine labs planned
cleanedEvents.description: Provider planned repeat electrolytes, ACTH, and renin testing in 4 weeks.

cleanedEvents.title: Interpreter phone call completed with mother
cleanedEvents.description: Nurse documented a Dari interpreter call with the patient's mother to review provider recommendations, and the parent verbalized understanding and agreed with the plan.
